title: STONEBORN Middle-Earth mod Support
description: STONEBORN Middle-Earth mod Support aim to modify the gui from the Middle-Earth mod to fit the StoneBorn style.
body:
This ressource pack modify the Middle-Earth GUi to fit the StoneBorn style.
Check the Main pack Page https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/stoneborn . The pack contain: - Forge Gui - Treated Anvil Gui - Artisan Table Gui - OnBoarding Gui - Middle-Earth Map Gui
